title: MPI-342 ComfyUI 0.28 bump - everything shipped except MPI-341 check 2 (unpin-kornia CI rebuild)

.agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-341/validation.md - the four checks and which are done

committed: Cubric-Vision fffd73ec - ComfyUI 0.27.0 -> 0.28.0 pins + POD_IMAGE_VERSION_DEV/_CPU_DEV -> v0.17.0-dev
Cubric-Vision a54f5210 + follow-up - kanban cards, MPI-342 plan/validation, MPI-345, MPI-329/333 research

pushed.cubric-vision: NO - local commits only; push is user-authorized

state.stable_pins_untouched: POD_IMAGE_VERSION / _CPU stay v0.16.0 - released users unaffected
state.pod: deleted by the user at end of session; anything Pod-dependent needs a fresh one

next_task.goal: Prove the node-import smoke test BITES - an unpinned kornia must FAIL the build at the smoke layer.
next_task.why: Checks 1, 3 and 4 pass, but a gate never seen to go red is unproven; the layer could be silently vacuous.
steps: 1. Branch in mpi-ci so main never carries a knowingly-broken pin: git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci checkout -b mpi-341-kornia-proof

2. In cubric-vision-pod/Dockerfile, find the kornia layer (RUN pip install --no-cache-dir 'kornia==0.8.2' && python -c 'import kornia; from kornia.geometry.transform.pyramid import pad; ...') and drop the ==0.8.2 pin so pip takes latest.

4. Dispatch against the branch, cu130 only (the cpu image bakes no nodes so it cannot exercise this): cd c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci && gh workflow run cubric-vision-pod-image.yml --ref mpi-341-kornia-proof -f manifest_version=0.17.1-dev -f wrapper_version=0.2.37 -f comfyui_ref=v0.28.0 -f push_latest=false -f only_profile=cu130

5. EXPECT A RED BUILD. Success = failure at the node-import smoke layer with 'IMPORT FAILED' naming ComfyUI-LTXVideo (printed by the grep). A GREEN build means the gate is vacuous and is itself the bug.
6. Record the outcome in tasks/MPI-341/validation.md (check 2) and tasks/MPI-342/validation.md, then delete the branch. Do NOT merge it.
7. The throwaway manifest_version (0.17.1-dev) matters: a surprise green build must not overwrite the proven v0.17.0-dev tags.
gotchas: comfyui_ref MUST be the TAG (v0.28.0), never the commit SHA - git clone --branch rejects a bare SHA, exit 128 (MPI-189).
manifest_version must match ^[0-9]+[.][0-9]+[.][0-9]+(-dev)?$ with NO leading v (MPI-119 double-v trap).
Read failures with: gh run view <id> --log-failed. The smoke layer's grep prints the failing node name.

items: released-build-resolves-stable proof: fake a BUILD_HASH stamp in js/core/buildInfo.js, restart, create a Pod, expect channel=stable, then git checkout the file. NOT build-gated.
one real publish-runtime.sh promote run. NOT build-gated.
New card, top of To do. Phantom generation. Repro LOCALLY first - free, qwen-edit is installed locally. First step: dispatch-origin logging in js/services/commandExecutor.js.
Now has a measured root pattern: model SWITCH costs ~2 min; same-model back-to-back is 8s. Suspect the aimdo dynamic-VRAM path. Do NOT lower HOT_STORE_MIN_GB - measured and largely disproven.
Leading suspect (full SHA256 re-read) looks wrong; per-FILE overhead is the better hypothesis. Next: time a Krea2 install, compare seconds-per-FILE.

durable_gotchas_learned: PIP_CONSTRAINT pinning a LOCAL version (+cu130) is unsatisfiable in any pip call that does not also know the pytorch index - PEP-517 isolated build envs inherit the constraint but not --index-url. Fixed with ENV PIP_EXTRA_INDEX_URL; keep the two together.

comfyui-krea2edit v1.2.1 tolerates ComfyUI's ref_latents wrapper arg introduced in core c9602625, dated AFTER the v0.28.0 tag. 0.28 is safe at our v1.1 pin; 0.29+ WILL break Krea2EditModelPatch unless the node moves past dc7940f4 in the same pass.
The mpi-ci node_lock copy had drifted (ComfyUI-MpiNodes ba9e1569 vs canonical aaa1d2d9). Always re-copy from the canonical lock at build time (MPI-117).
Krea2EditGroundedEncode (grounding_px) exists at krea2edit HEAD; our pin is v1.1. Wiring it is a node-commit bump only (installRequirements:false = volume-resident, no image). Still uncarded.
notes: The Cubric-Vision working tree also holds an unrelated sibling session's edits (MpiPromptBox.js, main.js, server.js, connectorResponder.js, untracked services/brokerBoot.js and splash/). Deliberately NOT committed. Do not sweep them up.
